title: Review: SpaceRole::all(), Phase 2a/2b comments, no-op SQL
notes:
Maintainer risk: LOW — three changes: comment clarification (correct), SpaceRole::all() (correct design, misleading docstring), no-op SQL removal (correct). Only real issue: docstring overclaims compiler enforcement for all().
Confidence: 10% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: not reading the full space_set validation path to verify all() is the only place the role list appears. Would raise confidence if: grep for hardcoded role string lists confirms no other independent copies exist.
